summary: Phase 8B: Final Live Trading Safeguards - 21/21 backend tests passed (100%), 16/16 frontend UI tests passed (100%). Cancel order endpoint, slippage protection, enhanced execution status, and Live Orders tab all working correctly.

minor.issue: New slippage config fields (max_live_slippage_bps, allow_aggressive_live) not exposed in Settings page Risk Configuration section - backend API has them, just not in UI

backend_api_tests: GET /api/execution/wallet returns correct structure with warnings array
GET /api/execution/mode returns current mode and credentials
Regression: GET /api/config includes persisted and last_saved
Regression: GET /api/config risk has max_live_slippage_bps and allow_aggressive_live
frontend_ui_tests: All 7 nav items present: Overview, Arbitrage, Sniper, Positions, Risk, Markets, Settings
P&L Curve section visible on overview
Positions page has 4 tabs: Positions, Trades, Orders, Live Orders
Live Orders tab shows paper mode message
Positions page stat cards visible (positions, exposure, unrealized, realized)
Settings page Risk Configuration section visible
Slippage config visible in Strategy Configuration (slippage base bps)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add max_live_slippage_bps and allow_aggressive_live inputs to Settings page Risk Configuration section (currently only in backend config)
fixes_applied: Fixed ExecutionEngine to store pending live_order_service and wire it when adapter starts
Fixed execution.py live_adapter_status fallback to include new Phase 8B fields (total_cancelled, total_slippage_rejected, fill_update_method, poll_interval_seconds)
Fixed server.py cancel endpoint to return 404 for 'order not found' instead of 400
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8B Final Live Trading Safeguards complete. KEY FEATURES: (1) Cancel order endpoint POST /api/execution/orders/{id}/cancel - returns 404 for nonexistent, 400 for terminal orders, 200 for successful cancel. (2) Slippage protection in GET /api/execution/status - shows max_live_slippage_bps (default 100) and allow_aggressive_live (default false). (3) Enhanced live_adapter status - includes fill_update_method='polling', poll_interval_seconds=5, total_cancelled, total_slippage_rejected counters. (4) Frontend Positions page has Live Orders tab with data-testid='live-orders-tab' and section data-testid='section-live-orders'. Shows paper mode message when not in live/shadow mode. Cancel buttons have data-testid='cancel-order-{id}'. NOTE: New slippage fields exist in backend RiskConfig but are NOT exposed in Settings UI - this is optional enhancement.
